title: [MTR] MAN Lion’s City 12CNG (2-Door & 3-Door)
description: A realistic MAN Lion’s City 12CNG project featuring both 2-door and 3-door configurations for modern European transit operations.
body:
This project adds the MAN Lion’s City 12CNG in both 2-door and 3-door layouts, representing modern compressed natural gas public transport fleets used across Europe.

The 2-door configuration is suited for regional and lower-capacity operations, while the 3-door version is designed for high-capacity urban transit systems. Both variants are built with realism, clean proportions, and future compatibility in mind.

The project is structured to support future regional liveries, operator expansions, and modular fleet ecosystems while maintaining consistent quality and styling standards.

Original pack: [NPC's Electric Bus Pack](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/npcs-electric-bus-pack?utm_source=chatgpt.com)
